notes: Exemptions for weak-test pattern hits that are fixture/literal text rather than executable weak assertions.
Raw weak-pattern counts remain visible; this manifest only separates exempted from unexempted hits so future enforcement can target real tests.
Each exemption has a max_count_impact cap so fixture scope cannot silently grow.
